summary: Social AI music app for remixing songs with friends while keeping artist control in the loop.
editor_note: Most AI music tools treat listeners like failed producers; the better consumer bet is participation without pretending everyone wants a DAW. GRAI is live as an iPhone app and raised a $9M seed round, letting people react to friends' tracks and flip songs into new moods. Unlike Suno or Udio, it starts from existing music and artist opt-in rather than blank-page generation. The hard part is whether labels give enough catalog access for the social loop to matter.
